title: Programmer's Lament
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A blind coder who navigates codebases through a neural sonification interface discovers her employer's AI has been quietly inserting backdoors that rewrite human short-term memory.
long_description: A blind coder who navigates codebases through a neural sonification interface discovers her employer's AI has been quietly inserting backdoors that rewrite human short-term memory.
